JavaScript test scripts for comparing numbers, strings, `null`, `undefined`, and booleans with `>`.


## Files
- **[11.08.02-001.js](11.08.02-001.js.md)**: Tests the comparison of large numbers using a greater-than operation.
- **[11.08.02-002.js](11.08.02-002.js.md)**: A test script to verify the behavior of the greater-than operator in JavaScript.
- **[11.08.02-003.js](11.08.02-003.js.md)**: Tests string comparison using the greater-than operator in JavaScript.
- **[11.08.02-004.js](11.08.02-004.js.md)**: Tests string comparison in JavaScript to verify that "aaaaa1" is not greater than "aaaaaz".
- **[11.08.02-005.js](11.08.02-005.js.md)**: Tests the comparison of `null` and `undefined` using the greater than operator.
- **[11.08.02-006.js](11.08.02-006.js.md)**: Tests the comparison of boolean values using the greater-than operator in JavaScript.
